Container.Name: skiptro
Container.Overview: Automatic TV show intro and credits detection using audio fingerprinting. Scans your media library and generates skip markers that Kodi (via service.skiptro) can use to auto-skip intros during playback.
Container.Changes:
[center][b]Skiptro Change Log[/b][/center]
[b]v0.14.0[/b] - Deprioritize studio bumpers when a longer actual intro exists (Star Trek Starfleet Academy) - Recover episodes with partial fingerprint matches using mel spectrogram similarity - Extend search window from 10 to 15 minutes for shows with late intros - Fix post-intro sound effects included in boundaries on shows with sustained silence (NCIS)
[b]v0.13.1[/b] - Accept directory paths in `scan-files` (previously required individual file paths) - Fix correlation validator rejecting valid intros on shows with narrator-style intros (Everybody Loves Raymond) - Fix post-intro sound effects being included in detected intro boundaries (NCIS) - Allow mel boundary trimming when fingerprinter overshoots into post-intro content - Prefer sustained silences over brief gaps when snapping end boundaries
[b]v0.13.0[/b] - Add mel spectrogram boundary extension for more accurate intro end detection - Add `--audio-stream N` flag to select specific audio track for multi-language files - Widen boundary snap window for better end-of-intro precision

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent data: scan results, library config, and database.

Config.Name: Media
Config.Description: Path to your TV show library. Must be read-write so skiptro can write .skiptro.json files alongside episodes. Add more paths below if your media is spread across multiple shares.

Config.Name: Media Paths
Config.Description: Container paths to register as media libraries (comma-separated). Must match your volume mount targets above. If you add more path mappings, add the container paths here too.

Config.Name: Scan Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule for automatic scans (default: 3 AM daily).
